text.title: chunking-semantic Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for chunking-semantic. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: SemanticChunker MUST accept a callable embedding_func, a similarity_threshold (default 0.75), max_chunk_size, and min_chunk_size. Chunks exceeding max_chunk_size MUST be sub-split; chunks below min_chunk_size MUST be merged into the previous chunk. An empty-document edge case (0 or 1 sentences) MUST return a single chunk without calling the embedding function.
rule.rationale: Without size guards, semantic chunking on long legal documents with high threshold values produces a single giant chunk that exceeds most LLM context windows. The empty-document guard prevents an IndexError on the embeddings list and avoids a wasted API call.
